How we help › Integrated Lifestyle Medicine
For all • All ages • Every stage of life

Health built into the way you live

Evidence-based care that works on the causes of poor health in how daily life runs: food, sleep, movement, stress and connection, with practical changes you can actually keep, regardless of age or ability.

What it's for

Medicine that starts with daily life

Integrated Lifestyle Medicine is for the problems that rarely have a single cause: persistent tiredness, poor sleep, digestive trouble, weight that will not shift, blood pressure creeping up, low mood, or simply the sense of running on empty. Whatever your age or ability, the aim is to address why your health is where it is, in the way your life actually runs, rather than treating symptoms in isolation.

Every session starts with a complete assessment covering food, sleep, movement, stress, connection and your history, because the picture only makes sense whole. From there we agree small, sustainable changes, built around your circumstances rather than an ideal week, reviewed and adjusted as your health responds, and joined up with hands-on care whenever it helps.

Get in touch

The easiest first step is a conversation. Tell us what is going on and we will point you the right way, with no pressure at all.

Call 07773 814488
What to expect

What Integrated Lifestyle Medicine involves

A complete assessment

The whole picture: food, sleep, movement, stress, connection and history, taken seriously and unhurried.

Small changes that stick

Realistic adjustments agreed together and built into your actual week, because the plan you can keep beats the perfect one you cannot.

Causes, not just symptoms

Progress measured in energy, sleep, mood and the numbers that matter to you, reviewed over time as your health rebuilds.

What it means for you

Small changes, compounding results

Nothing here asks for a new life overnight. A little better fed, a little better slept, a little more movement and a little less strain, kept up week after week, is how health quietly rebuilds itself.

Reassurance

Safe, gentle, and at your pace

Everything is done with care and at a pace that suits you, and nothing is rushed or forced. The aim throughout is simple: that you feel in good hands, understood, and steadily better.

How we help

Part of a wider range of connected care

Integrated Lifestyle Medicine is one of eight connected services, matched to you rather than delivered from a fixed menu.

  • Advanced Sports Therapy
  • Clinical Remedial Massage
  • Pain & Injury Support
  • Movement & Mobility Care
  • Integrated Rehabilitation
  • Performance & Wellbeing
  • Integrated Lifestyle Medicine · you are here
  • Medical Acupuncture
See all services ›
Recognised and accountable

Held to recognised professional standards

Members and registrants of the Royal Society of Medicine, the Complementary and Natural Healthcare Council, the Institute for Functional Medicine, the Society of Sports Therapists, the Institute of Sport and Remedial Massage and the British Medical Acupuncture Society, among others.
